headline: Ameren Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
summary: Ameren Corporation (NYSE: AEE) today announced first quarter 2026 net income attributable to common shareholders of $357 million, or $1.28 per diluted share, compared to first quarter 2025 net income of $289 million, or $1.07 per diluted share.

headline: Ameren Affirms FY2026 GAAP EPS Guidance of $5.25-$5.45 vs $5.36 Est

headline: Ameren Q1 EPS $1.28 Beats $1.18 Estimate, Sales $2.176B Miss $2.257B Estimate
summary: Ameren (NYSE:AEE) reported quarterly earnings of $1.28 per share which beat the analyst consensus estimate of $1.18 by 8.47 percent. This is a 19.63 percent increase over earnings of $1.07 per share from the same period
